summary_en: Dividend policy amended effective FY3/27 to adopt progressive dividend with minimum payout ratio 50%, maintaining or increasing dividends in principle. Shareholder incentive program expanded to include holders of 100+ shares.
title_en: Notice on Dividend Policy Change (Introduction of Progressive Dividend, etc.) and Shareholder Incentive Program Expansion
translation_en_brief: NCD's board on 15 May 2026 approved a change to dividend policy and expansion of shareholder incentive benefits. The company adopts a progressive dividend approach effective FY3/27, committing in principle to maintain or increase dividends while maintaining a consolidated payout ratio floor of 50% or above. The prior policy simply aimed for a 50%+ payout ratio without an explicit commitment to non-reduction. The company also plans opportunistic buybacks as part of capital returns, subject to financial position and market conditions. Separately, the shareholder incentive program was expanded to include holders of 100+ shares (previously 1,000+), with proportional QUO card awards ranging from ¥500 to ¥7,000 depending on share count and tenure, effective 30 September 2026.
